case_title: ARMSTRONG CARPET AND LINOLEUM CO VS RUSSELL MACMASTERS AND ASSOCIATES INC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL MACMASTERS AND ASSOCIATES INC
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL MACMASTERS AND ASSOCIATES INC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
